name: Isolated Footing Calculator
seo_title: Isolated Footing Calculator - Concrete per Column Base
seo_description: Building foundations? Enter your footing dimensions and quantity to calculate total concrete volume. Includes cement bags, blinding layer advice, and waste factor for accurate ordering.
example_label: Calculate concrete and formwork for 4 isolated footings of 1.5m x 1.5m with 50cm depth.

range_hints.canto: Minimum 0.30 m for light loads, 0.40–0.60 m standard
range_hints.cantidad: Number of footings in the foundation plan

result_context: Each footing requires {vol_unitario} m³ of concrete. For {cantidad} footings: {vol_total} m³ total, {cemento_sacos} bags of cement, {acero_kg} kg of steel and {encofrado_m2} m² of formwork.
formula_display: Volume per footing = Length x Width x Depth; Total Volume = Volume per footing x Quantity
steps: Calculate volume unitario: 1.5m × 1.5m × 0.5m = 1.125 m³ per footing
Calculate steel of reinforcement: 4.5m³ × 120 kg/m³ = 540 kg
mistakes: No aumentar The tamaño of The footing when The floor tiene baja capacidad portante
Omitir The steel of Wait to conectar with The column
No Consider The solado of limpieza of 10cm debajo of The footing
description: Isolated Footing Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
desc: Isolated Footing Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
